race.description: Sale Cup Sunday October 25th 2YO Mdn Plate
race.comment: CAPITAL STORM (2) is a son of Written Tycoon out of Dongxing Princess having his first start. Winner of a recent trial with today's rider Lachlan Neindorf aboard. Looks ready to go and can make an immediate impact. IZZYBELLA (9) is a daughter of Snitzel from the Group 1 winner Invincibella who makes her debut. Showed ability at the trials and respecting the top yard and bloodlines. COMMIT (3) raced once in the maiden preparation when fourth in the LR Debutante Stakes at Caulfield over 1000m back on October 15. Better for that run and can improve sharply. ALPINE POINT (1) was okay on debut on heavy ground and can improve.
